name: Mediterranean Shrimp and Bow Ties
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Uncooked bow tie pasta (3 cups)
1 tablespoon Olive oil or vegetable oil
1/2 cup Green onion, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta to desired doneness as directed on the package; drain and keep warm.
2. Meanwhile, heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat until hot. Add shrimp, green onion, and garlic; cook and stir for 3 to 5 minutes or until the shrimp turn pink. Remove from heat.
3. Add all remaining ingredients to the skillet with the pasta. Cook for 1 to 2 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
330 Calories, 10 g Fat, 600 mg Sodium
